Pseudospore Mushie.name: 拟孢子蘑菇仔 Pseudospore Mushie
Pseudospore Mushie.description:
你的培育者使用魔法将通常不会用孢子进行繁殖的生物的生物精华制成孢子。因此，你获得了与另一种非真菌族裔相关的外观特性。如果该族裔的成员通常为超小体型，则你的体型为超小；否则，你为小型。你获得该族裔的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} 通用专长。由GM酌情决定，你可能会获得该族裔的非机制性外在特征，但这些特征未体现在该族裔的基础能力中。

Your cultivators used magic to make spores out of the biological essence of creatures that don't usually use spores in their reproduction. As a result, you developed cosmetic features associated with another nonfungal ancestry. Your size is Tiny if members of that ancestry are typically Tiny; otherwise, you are Small. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat for that ancestry. At the GM's discretion, you might gain nonmechanical external features of the ancestry that are not represented in the ancestry's base abilities.

Bulbous Mushie.name: 球形蘑菇怪 Bulbous Mushie
Bulbous Mushie.description:
你的血脉源自永远好奇且信任他人的博尔巴洛斯。和博尔巴洛斯一样，你会从你的菌盖分泌出黏稠的红色黏液。你获得等同于你等级一半的酸抗力（最低 1）。此外，你菌盖分泌的黏液能帮助你更快清除有害的酸蚀。你用于移除持续性酸伤害的纯骰检定 DC 为 10 而非 DC 15；如果另一名生物使用特别合适的动作来协助，则该 DC 降为 DC 5。

Your lineage descends from ever-curious and trusting bolbaloses. Like a bolbalos, you secrete a sticky red slime from your cap. You gain acid resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1). Additionally, the slime from your cap helps you clear away harmful acids more quickly. Your flat check to remove persistent acid damage is DC 10 instead of DC 15, which is reduced to DC 5 if another creature uses a particularly appropriate action to help.

Draconic Mushie.name: 龙裔蘑菇仔 Draconic Mushie
Draconic Mushie.description:
来自强大毒蝇伞龙的孢子是你传承的一部分。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.VLwFJ30lHqls0M7Y]{Cluster's Coordination}族裔专长。你可以选择具有毒蝇伞龙血脉的龙族后裔可用的族裔专长。

Spores from a mighty toadstool dragon are part of your heritage. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.VLwFJ30lHqls0M7Y]{Cluster's Coordination} ancestry feat. You can take the ancestry feats available to draconic scions with toadstool dragon lineage.

Extinguished Wisp.name: 熄灭幽火 Extinguished Wisp
Extinguished Wisp.description:
与你大多数鬼火不同，你的身体不会发出辉光。你可能天生如此，或许曾遭遇过压倒性的黑暗魔法。你甚至可能曾是折磨者鬼火，为了切断你与亵渎魔法的联系并重新获得可见的身体而牺牲了你的光。你失去辉光族裔能力，使你看起来像一种飘忽但不发光的形态，有点像灵体或元素生物，但你获得微光视野和黑暗视觉。

Unlike most will-o'-wisps, your body doesn't glow. You might have been born this way, or you might have had an encounter with overwhelming darkness magic. You might even be a former tormentor wisp who sacrificed your light to sever your connection to profane magic and regain a visible body. You lose the glow ancestry ability, causing you to look like a wispy but unglowing form looking somewhat like a spirit or an elemental, but you gain both low-light vision and darkvision.

Skulking Wisp.name: 潜行鬼火 Skulking Wisp
Skulking Wisp.description:
你擅长在不被察觉的情况下潜行。你获得隐匿的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你已经在隐匿中为受训，你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{地形潜伏者}技能专长。你可以将熄灭你辉光族裔能力所发出的光作为进行[[/act hide]]或[[/act sneak]]动作的一部分。

You have a knack for skulking around undetected. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Stealth. If you were already trained in Stealth, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat. You can extinguish the light from your glow ancestry ability as a part of the action to [[/act hide]] or [[/act sneak]].

Thicket Mushie.name: 荆棘蘑菇怪 Thicket Mushie
Thicket Mushie.description:
一只高大而强壮的荆棘海胆的孢子在你全身扎下根，发育成绿色的尖刺。你的体型为中型。你获得一种尖刺徒手攻击，造成1d6钝击伤害。你的尖刺属于搏斗组，并具有灵巧和徒手特征。

The spores of a towering and mighty thicket urchin took root across your body, developing into green spines. Your size is Medium. You have a spine unarmed attack that deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage. Your spine is in the brawling group and has the finesse and unarmed traits.

Treesighted Mushie.name: 树视菇菇 Treesighted Mushie
Treesighted Mushie.description:
树眼真菌用来寄生附着在树木上并汲取其汁液与秘密的同样孢子融入了你的身体，发育成一张不断抽动与转动的眼睛网络，同时朝向数个方向以警戒危险或洞察隐藏的真相。你可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.7P6TsZycPvzGHBrE]{多眼勘察} 动作。

The same spores that the tree of eyes fungus uses to parasitically attach to trees and feed on their sap and secrets blended into your body, developing as a network of eyes that constantly twitch and swivel, facing in several directions at once to watch for danger or hidden truths. You can use the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.7P6TsZycPvzGHBrE]{Many-Eyed Survey} action.

Percussive Mushie.name: 打击蘑菇怪 Percussive Mushie
Percussive Mushie.description:
你帽子的共鸣使你成为一件行走的乐器，就像你那鼓帽祖先一样。你的头是一面鼓，你可以用鼓槌或钝击武器来敲奏。它起初是一面标准鼓，但其品质会随着你的成长而提升。在3级时，你在使用头部作为鼓进行表演检定时获得+1物品加值；在9级时该加值提高至+2；在17级时提高至+3。

你在表演上受训，并且你获得适用于打击乐器的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lFwfUvH2708rl6i3]{Virtuosic Performer} 技能专长。

The resonance of your cap makes you a walking musical instrument, much like your drumcap forebears. Your head is a drum, which you can play with mallets or bludgeoning weapons. While it begins as a standard drum, its quality improves as you grow. At 3rd level, you gain a +1 item bonus to Performance checks using your head as a drum, which increases to a +2 bonus at 9th level and a +3 bonus at 17th level.

You are trained in Performance, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lFwfUvH2708rl6i3]{Virtuosic Performer} skill feat for percussion instruments.

Floating Wisp.name: 漂浮灵火 Floating Wisp
Floating Wisp.description:
在地面上方上下浮动对你来说是第二天性。你的空中把戏帮助你避开危险的地面——并且可能诱使他人踉跄跌入你的陷阱。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.PJISFLeMO4DTIkcF]{Twinkling Hover} 专长。

Bobbing around above the ground is second nature to you. Your aerial tricks help you avoid dangerous ground–and potentially trick others into stumbling into your traps. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.PJISFLeMO4DTIkcF]{Twinkling Hover} feat.

Monospore Mushie.name: 单孢蘑菇仔 Monospore Mushie
Monospore Mushie.description:
你是完全由蘑菇孢子培育出来的。你的身体没有因其他真菌的影响而发展出其他特性，而是发展出了敏锐的视力。即使不需要光，你也能在地下生活得和在地表一样舒适。你获得黑暗视觉。

You were cultivated exclusively with mushie spores. Instead of developing other features from the influence of another fungus, your body developed keen eyesight. Without the need for light, you can live just as comfortably underground as you can on the surface. You gain darkvision.

Phantasmal Mushie.name: 幻象蘑菇小精灵 Phantasmal Mushie
Phantasmal Mushie.description:
尽管你所源自的幻雾珊瑚会附着在灵魂上以吞噬它们，你却学会了利用你与彼岸的联结来转而帮助盟友。除了吞食腐败物质外，当灵魂前往来世时留下的残渣也能为你提供养分。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.pDLQmMyIwV0Zk9Kw]{Tether Soul} 反应动作（）。

While the phasmogorgia you're descended from latch on to souls to consume them, you've learned to use your connection to the beyond to help your allies instead. In addition to consuming decaying matter, you can derive sustenance from the residue left over when souls pass on to the afterlife. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.pDLQmMyIwV0Zk9Kw]{Tether Soul} reaction.

Frigid Wisp.name: 寒霜幽光 Frigid Wisp
Frigid Wisp.description:
你冰冷的蓝色光芒源自严寒夜晚沼泽地上摇曳的灯笼。你族裔的光源是寒冷而非火焰或电力。基于你光源的能力获得寒冷（特征）。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.sAS9i1MtcghuTE5O]{灯笼的抗力} 专长，用于寒冷伤害，并且你将环境寒冷效果视为降低一个等级的极端（难以置信的寒冷变为极端，极端寒冷变为严重，依此类推）。

Your cold blue light is born from the lanterns that flicker over marshlands on frigid nights. The light source from your ancestry is cold instead of fire or electricity. Abilities that are based on your light source gain the cold trait. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.feats.Item.sAS9i1MtcghuTE5O]{Lantern's Resistance} feat for cold damage, and you treat environmental cold effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible cold becomes extreme, extreme cold becomes severe, and so on).

Captivating Wisp.name: 摄魂磷火 Captivating Wisp
Captivating Wisp.description:
你用自身光芒的舞动与摇曳迷惑并吸引所有观看者。你获得表演的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你已在表演中受训，你改为在你选择的一项技能中受训。你也获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{迷人表演} 技能专长。当你的族裔辉光处于激活状态时，使用视觉形式的表演进行 [[/act perform]] 动作时，你一次能使陷入着迷的生物数量是正常的两倍。

You captivate and confound those who watch the dance and sway of your lights. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Performance. If you were already trained in Performance, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance} skill feat. While the glow from your ancestry is active, you can fascinate twice as many creatures with the [[/act perform]] action at the same time as normal when using a visual form of performance.

Constellation Wisp.name: 星座灵火 Constellation Wisp
Constellation Wisp.description:
你周围环绕着由四道光组成的星座，你可以将其作为自身的延伸来控制。这些光会在你的辉光处于激活状态时出现，而如果你压制你的辉光，它们会立刻消失。当你说话时，你的声音回响会从每一道星座之光中传出。你可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.VdV5iGB8TDhvqHqZ]{引导星座} 来调整星座之光的位置。未使用引导星座移动过的光，或在消失后重新出现的光，会留在你的方格中。

这些光保持其相对于你的距离与方向，并会在你移动时随之移动。若没有可供该光占据的空间，例如它必须进入墙内，则它会改为移动到最近的有效方格。若一道光将要离开你的效果线，它会闪烁消失，直到你下一次引导星座。

You are surrounded by a constellation of four lights that you can control as an extension of yourself. The lights appear whenever your glow is active, and vanish immediately if you suppress your glow. When you speak, an echo of your voice emerges from each of the constellation lights. You can adjust the constellation lights' positioning with @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.actions.Item.VdV5iGB8TDhvqHqZ]{Steer Constellation}. Lights that haven't been moved with Steer Constellation or that have reappeared after vanishing remain in your square.

The lights maintain their relative distance and direction to you, moving whenever you move. If there isn't a space for the light to occupy, such as if it would have to go into a wall, it instead moves to the closest valid square. If a light would leave your line of effect, it winks out until the next time you Steer Constellation.
